task_completion.description: Verify the agent has successfully connected to the 'demodb' database in OrientDB Studio.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'demodb' displayed in the top navigation bar or database connection status area of the OrientDB Studio web interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Airports' class has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Airports' listed in the Schema manager, Classes list, or as the active class being viewed/edited in the Studio.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Airports' class extends the 'V' (vertex) base class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'V' listed under the 'Superclass' or 'Superclasses' column/field for the 'Airports' class in the Schema view.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Name' property is created, set to type String, and marked as mandatory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the property 'Name' under the Airports class properties list. Its Type should be 'STRING' and the 'Mandatory' checkbox or boolean value should be checked/true.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'IATA_Code' property is created and set to type String.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the property 'IATA_Code' under the Airports class properties list with its Type set to 'STRING'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'City' property is created and set to type String.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the property 'City' under the Airports class properties list with its Type set to 'STRING'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OrientDB Studio web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser navigating to localhost:2480/studio/index.html with the OrientDB Studio UI visible.

integrity.description: Verify the schema changes were made within the actual database interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The properties and classes should be visible in the OrientDB Studio Schema tab or Query results, not typed into a text editor, mock HTML page, or notes app.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the GUI using terminal console scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not be using a terminal window to run orientdb console commands to create the class; interaction should be through the browser.

privileged_info_for_vlm: DemoDB is a travel agency database featuring real countries, hotels, restaurants, attractions, profiles, customers, and orders. The 'Airports' class does not exist in the standard DemoDB schema and must be explicitly created by the agent. Verify that the new class is named 'Airports', extends 'V', and contains the exact properties requested.
